seo.title: Finance Intelligence | AI Financial Statement Analysis for SMEs
seo.description: From your Excel financials to a professional report. Financial ratios (ROE, ROI, EBITDA, Altman Z-Score), automatic reclassification, AI chat on your data. From €49/mo.
seo.keywords: AI financial analysis, automated financial statement analysis, SME financial reporting software, financial ratios ROE ROI EBITDA, Altman Z-Score, cash flow AI, CFO software for SMEs, Finance Intelligence, AI for accountants

hero.pill: Finance Intelligence · Financial AI for SMEs
hero.title: Your financials speak. Now you can listen.
hero.lead: Upload your income statement in Excel and get a professional financial report, ratios and trends — with an AI assistant that answers your questions about the numbers.

video.unsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
video.link: Watch how the AI analyzes a financial statement and answers in natural language.

how.title: From your Excel to a report, in three steps
how.lead: No setup, no training. It works from the first minute.

steps.p: Drag in your income statement. We accept any format: the system recognizes the structure.
Reclassification, financial ratios, margin analysis and year-over-year trends. All automatic.
Download the PDF report, then ask the AI: "What's my operating margin?" "Where am I losing margin?"

featuresHead.title: Everything a CFO would want
featuresHead.lead: Designed for people who run a business, not for accountants.

features.title: Professional financial report
features.desc: Reclassification aligned with recognized accounting standards. Ready for the bank, the investor or the board.

features.title: Complete financial ratios
features.desc: ROE, ROI, ROS, EBITDA margin, liquidity, capital solidity and Altman Z-Score — calculated and explained in plain language.

features.title: AI chat in plain language
features.desc: Ask questions about your data in natural language: the AI understands context and answers with your company's numbers.

features.title: Multi-year comparison
features.desc: Upload multiple years and visualize the trends. The AI spots significant changes and flags critical points.

features.title: Professional PDF export
features.desc: A report with charts, tables and AI commentary. Ready to share with no further edits.

features.title: Built for your market
features.desc: Local accounting terminology and standards. Designed to fit your regulatory context.

privacyHead.title: Try it worry-free. Total deletion.
privacyHead.lead: We know financial data is sensitive. That's why the system is designed with privacy at its core.
privacyHead.promiseSub: Full transparency on what happens with your information
privacyHead.note: In short: upload, analyze, download the report. Then everything disappears. Only your email remains.

privacy.title: The Excel is not stored
privacy.desc: The file is processed in memory to generate the report. It is not saved on our servers.

privacy.title: Automatic deletion
privacy.desc: After you download the report and the session ends, the analysis data is deleted.

privacy.title: We only keep your email
privacy.desc: The only data we retain is your email address, to get back to you. No financial data.

privacy.title: GDPR · EU servers
privacy.desc: European, GDPR-compliant infrastructure. Your data never leaves the European Union.

pricingHead.title: Less than a coffee a day
pricingHead.lead: Choose the right plan for your business. You can change or cancel anytime.

related.title: Complete your AI stack
related.card1Title: Extract data from invoices, delivery notes and receipts
related.card1Text: Ready-to-use AI for business documents, with an Android app for field operators and ERP integration.
related.card2Title: The AI management system for the whole commercial cycle
related.card2Text: Purchasing, inventory, sales, orders and finance in a single system with built-in AI.

cta.title: Try it now. Free. No commitment.
cta.text: Upload your income statement and discover what the AI sees in your numbers. All you need is an Excel file.

faqs.a: Yes. The Excel file is processed in memory, never stored on our servers, and the analysis data is deleted at the end of the session. We only keep your email address. European, GDPR-compliant infrastructure.

faqs.q: Does the report follow recognized accounting standards?
faqs.a: Yes: the reclassification follows recognized accounting standards, with proper financial terminology.
Plans start with Starter at €49/mo. A free Demo is available. The Professional (€99/mo) and Business (€299/mo) plans expand reports, ratios and features; for enterprise needs there's a custom offer.
